question_html: Write the correct indirect speech: My grandfather said, “I will have a glass of milk at night.”
options_html: My grandfather said that he will have a glass of milk at night.
My grandfather told that he can have a glass of milk at night.
My grandfather said that he would have a glass of milk at night.
My grandfather said that he might have a glass of milk at night.
correct_answer_html: My grandfather said that he would have a glass of milk at night.
